candidate_llm_application: TONGKONAN-TIER-GATE — 3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask. Tokens classified into tier-3 (sacred/priority: system prompt + safety + retrieval-grounded), tier-2 (active context recent N tokens), tier-1 (background older). M[i,j]=1 if tier(j) >= tier(i) with asymmetric exception (cannot upward attend). tier-3 broadcasts; tier-1 self-only. Optional decay re-classifies tier-2 to tier-1 after N tokens.
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.url: DAM Dynamic Attention Mask Findings ACL 2025
results.title: DAM Dynamic Attention Mask — dynamic per-layer + per-token context-priority mask
results.rationale: DAM provides per-token + per-layer attention masking with explicit context-priority weighting — directly the candidate's tier-classification + asymmetric attention-mask substrate. The candidate's 3-tier classification with M[i,j]=1 iff tier(j)>=tier(i) IS a special case of DAM's dynamic-per-token mask with priority levels. Functional-twin on the dynamic-context-priority-mask substrate; semantic-twin on the context-priority attention framing. Keyword overlap on '3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask' framing (kw_count=1).

results.title: SWAA Sliding Window Attention 2512.10411 — sliding-window adaptation Qwen3/Llama3.1
results.rationale: SWAA's sliding-window attention IS the recency-based context-bounding mechanism the candidate's tier-2-decays-to-tier-1-after-N-tokens reproduces. The candidate's optional decay rule (tier-2 ages to tier-1 after N tokens) IS a sliding-window over the tier-2 region with explicit aging — directly SWAA's sliding-window-attention pattern with a labeling overlay. Functional-twin on the recency-decay attention substrate; semantic-twin on the sliding-window framing. Keyword overlap on 'stilt-pile elevation attention context' (kw_count=1).

results.title: Mixture Attention Spans OpenReview — heterogeneous sliding-window lengths
results.rationale: Mixture Attention Spans supplies the heterogeneous-window-length attention substrate — directly the candidate's per-tier different attention scope (tier-3 broadcast vs tier-2 windowed vs tier-1 self-only). The candidate's three tier-specific attention scopes IS a mixture-of-attention-spans with three discrete span lengths (infinity, N, 1). Functional-twin on the mixture-of-attention-spans substrate; semantic-twin on the heterogeneous-context-window framing.

results.title: BuildFastWithAI Hierarchical Attention — L1 always-present + L2 active context
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the hierarchical-tiered-attention paradigm. BuildFastWithAI Hierarchical Attention IS the L1-always-present + L2-active-context tiered-attention pattern — directly the candidate's tier-3-broadcast + tier-2-active-context contribution verbatim. The candidate's 3-tier scheme (sacred-broadcast / active-context / background) IS BuildFastWithAI's L1+L2 design extended by one additional background level. Keyword overlap on 'tier-3 sacred broadcast tier-1 background' and '3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask' (kw_count=2). Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on the hierarchical-tiered-context-attention substrate. The candidate's sacred/lineage-anchor labels are cultural narrative overlay on BuildFastWithAI's existing always-present-priority + active-window architecture.

results.title: HatLLM Hierarchical Attention Masking — 3-regime per-layer (intra-item/vanilla/cross-item)
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the 3-regime hierarchical-attention-mask paradigm. HatLLM IS the 3-regime per-layer attention-masking design (intra-item / vanilla / cross-item) — directly the candidate's 3-tier asymmetric attention mask verbatim. The candidate's M[i,j]=1 iff tier(j)>=tier(i) asymmetric rule IS HatLLM's regime-specific masking with a tier-ordering. The 3-tier structure with regime-specific attention scope matches one-to-one. Keyword overlap on '3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask' and 'lineage-priority cross-tier attention rule' (kw_count=2). Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on the 3-regime hierarchical-attention-masking substrate. The candidate's sacred/active/background labels are narrative overlay; the underlying 3-regime attention-mask is HatLLM's design.

results.title: Hierarchical Context Window 2026 — L1 system + L2 active + L3 background
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN, NEAR-VERBATIM MATCH on the entire candidate. Hierarchical Context Window 2026 IS the L1-system + L2-active + L3-background 3-tier hierarchical-context-window paradigm — directly the candidate's tier-3-sacred(system) + tier-2-active + tier-1-background 3-tier scheme verbatim. The candidate's tier-3 = system prompt + safety + retrieval = L1's system layer; tier-2 = active recent N tokens = L2's active layer; tier-1 = background older = L3's background layer. ONE-TO-ONE correspondence on all three tiers. Keyword overlap on '3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask', 'tier-3 sacred broadcast tier-1 background', AND 'lineage-priority cross-tier attention rule' (kw_count=3). Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on the entire 3-tier-context-window architecture. The Toraja/Tongkonan/Sulawesi cultural framing supplies only narrative for the L1+L2+L3 hierarchical-context-window design Hierarchical Context Window 2026 specifies.

results.title: Big LLM Architecture Comparison Qwen3-Next — gated attention sigmoid + hybrid mixing
results.rationale: Qwen3-Next's gated-attention + hybrid-mixing pattern IS the gated-context-attention substrate the candidate's tier-gating composes from. The candidate's form ('context-gating') IS Qwen3-Next's gated-attention paradigm with tier-based gating selection. Functional-twin on the gated-attention-mechanism substrate. While not a literal 3-tier match, the gating-attention pattern at function level is the same mechanism the candidate deploys with tier labels.

results.title: Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595
results.rationale: Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595 catalogs the attention-mask-and-context-window design space (sparse masks, sliding-window, hierarchical, tier-priority) the candidate's 3-tier asymmetric mask directly instantiates. The candidate's 3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask + decay-window IS a composition of multiple efficient-attention patterns the survey documents (hierarchical mask + sliding-window decay + priority broadcasting). Functional-twin on the efficient-attention-mask substrate; semantic-twin on the attention-mask-design-space framing. Keyword overlap on 'stilt-pile elevation attention context' (kw_count=1).

reason: 8 of 8 results trigger hit; 3 additionally trigger kw>=2. Maximum semantic 0.96 and maximum functional 0.96 on Hierarchical Context Window 2026 — a near-verbatim L1+L2+L3 three-tier hierarchical context-window match to the candidate's tier-3+tier-2+tier-1 scheme. The candidate decomposes exhaustively across four prior-art clusters: (cluster A — hierarchical/tiered attention masking with explicit tier-specific regimes) Hierarchical Context Window 2026 (kw=3, sem 0.96, func 0.96) IS the L1-system + L2-active + L3-background 3-tier scheme verbatim; HatLLM (kw=2, sem 0.92, func 0.90) IS the 3-regime per-layer attention-masking design; BuildFastWithAI Hierarchical Attention (kw=2, sem 0.90, func 0.88) IS the L1-always-present + L2-active-context tiered-attention pattern. (cluster B — sliding-window / windowed attention with recency decay) SWAA Sliding Window Attention 2512.10411 (sem 0.72, func 0.74) supplies the recency-decay sliding-window mechanism the candidate's tier-2-decays-to-tier-1-after-N-tokens reproduces; Mixture Attention Spans (sem 0.74, func 0.72) supplies the heterogeneous-window-lengths substrate the candidate's per-tier-different-scope reproduces. (cluster C — dynamic / context-priority attention mask) DAM Dynamic Attention Mask (sem 0.78, func 0.76) supplies the per-token + per-layer context-priority mask substrate the candidate's tier-classification mask instantiates. (cluster D — gated-attention + efficient-attention mask design space) Qwen3-Next gated-attention (func 0.70) supplies the gated-context-attention mechanism; Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595 (sem 0.74, func 0.78) catalogs the entire mask-and-window design space the candidate composes from. The three claimed contributions — (a) 3-tier elevation-asymmetric attention mask with M[i,j]=1 iff tier(j)>=tier(i), (b) tier-3 broadcast + tier-1 self-only asymmetric scope, (c) optional decay re-classifying tier-2 to tier-1 after N tokens — are anticipated cluster-by-cluster: (a) by HatLLM's 3-regime per-layer mask + Hierarchical Context Window 2026's L1+L2+L3 structure verbatim; (b) by BuildFastWithAI's L1-always-present-broadcast + L2-active-window design + Mixture Attention Spans' heterogeneous-window-lengths; (c) by SWAA's sliding-window-with-recency-decay verbatim. The Toraja/Tongkonan/sacred-relic/Sulawesi-cosmological cultural framing supplies only narrative for the hierarchical-tier-attention-mask + sliding-window-decay design; the underlying mechanism is fully covered. total_hits = 8 >> 1, kw_hits = 3, distinct_effect_clusters = 4 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. TONGKONAN-TIER-GATE is fully anticipated by the conjunction Hierarchical Context Window 2026 + HatLLM + BuildFastWithAI Hierarchical Attention + SWAA Sliding Window Attention 2512.10411 + Mixture Attention Spans + DAM Dynamic Attention Mask + Qwen3-Next gated-attention + Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595. Specifically: (1) the 3-tier hierarchical attention-mask scheme (tier-3 system+safety+retrieval / tier-2 active-recent-N / tier-1 background-older) IS Hierarchical Context Window 2026's L1+L2+L3 system+active+background scheme verbatim; (2) the tier-specific attention-mask regimes (tier-3 broadcast / tier-2 windowed / tier-1 self-only) IS HatLLM's 3-regime per-layer attention-masking + BuildFastWithAI's L1-always-present + L2-active-context design; (3) the asymmetric rule M[i,j]=1 iff tier(j)>=tier(i) IS HatLLM's regime-specific cross-item-vs-intra-item asymmetric masking with a tier-ordering; (4) the optional decay re-classifying tier-2 to tier-1 after N tokens IS SWAA Sliding Window Attention 2512.10411's sliding-window-with-recency mechanism verbatim; (5) the heterogeneous per-tier attention scope (broadcast / window / self-only) IS Mixture Attention Spans' heterogeneous-window-lengths substrate; (6) the context-priority gating IS DAM Dynamic Attention Mask's per-token context-priority mask + Qwen3-Next's gated-attention design. To salvage, the candidate would need a feature uniquely supplied by the Tongkonan source not anticipated by these clusters, e.g.: (a) a saddleback-roof-shape operationalized as a learned attention-curve over context positions with provable approximation advantage over flat-tier masks — beyond Hierarchical Context Window 2026's discrete-tier scheme; (b) a north-south-cosmological-orientation operationalized as a directional/positional-asymmetric mask with formal head-direction-bias decomposition — beyond standard causal-asymmetric masking; (c) a sacred-relic-top-tier operationalized as a learned lineage-anchor token whose information density is provably preserved under gradient updates across long horizons — beyond ordinary system-prompt persistence; (d) a stilt-pile-foundation operationalized as a load-bearing token routing protocol where information from tier-1 must pass through a fixed bottleneck before reaching tier-3 with demonstrated mutual-information-preservation lower bound — beyond HatLLM's regime-specific masking. As stated, TONGKONAN-TIER-GATE is in the saturated region documented by Hierarchical Context Window 2026 + HatLLM + BuildFastWithAI + SWAA + Mixture Attention Spans + DAM + Qwen3-Next + Efficient Attention Survey 2507.19595, with each of the three claimed contributions anticipated by at least two prior-art clusters.
